name: David McFarlane: Nexaweb Platform 4.5 Supports Ajax, Java
description: Outlook Series interview-style press coverage (2006-12-18) announcing Nexaweb Platform 4.5, which pairs the Universal Client Framework (UCF) for Ajax/Java with Section 508 accessibility compliance. Peter S. Kastner (Research VP, technology integration at Aberdeen Group) cites Aberdeen research that two-thirds of survey respondents view improving services to IT users as a key business requirement and endorses Nexaweb's composite-application approach for rich cross-platform experiences that preserve legacy IT assets.
